'''rapudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcbirneyite|mcbirneyite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcbirneyite|mcbirneyite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rapudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræpidith|ræpidith]] || [[word:ræpidij|ræpidij]] || [[word:ræpidish|ræpidish]] || [[word:ræpidi|ræpidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rapupuduth|rapupuduth]] || [[word:rapupuduj|rapupuduj]] || [[word:rapupudush|rapupudush]] || [[word:rapupudu|rapupudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rapuduth|rapuduth]] || [[word:rapuduj|rapuduj]] || [[word:rapudush|rapudush]] || [[word:rapudu|rapudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rapufduth|rapufduth]] || [[word:rapufduj|rapufduj]] || [[word:rapufdush|rapufdush]] || [[word:rapufduf|rapufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rapuduthu|rapuduthu]] || [[word:rapuduju|rapuduju]] || [[word:rapudushu|rapudushu]] || [[word:rapuduku|rapuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rapuduth|rapuduth]] || [[word:rapuduj|rapuduj]] || [[word:rapudush|rapudush]] || [[word:rapudu|rapudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rapuduthul|rapuduthul]] || [[word:rapudujul|rapudujul]] || [[word:rapudushul|rapudushul]] || [[word:rapudukul|rapudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rapuduthuthu|rapuduthuthu]] || [[word:rapudujuju|rapudujuju]] || [[word:rapudushushu|rapudushushu]] || [[word:rapuduku|rapuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rapuduthun|rapuduthun]] || [[word:rapudujun|rapudujun]] || [[word:rapudushun|rapudushun]] || [[word:rapudukun|rapudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rapuduthuoro|rapuduthuoro]] || [[word:rapudujuoro|rapudujuoro]] || [[word:rapudushuoro|rapudushuoro]] || [[word:rapudukuoro|rapudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
